title: Getting Started
description: A guided introduction to Knogra — nodes, scenes, AI assistant, and more. Start here.

title: Quantum mechanics basics
description: A graph exploring basic concepts of the quantum mechanics.

title: Agentic AI basics
description: A graph exploring basic concepts of the agentic ai

title: Internet and the Web
description: The internet, mapped end to end — from cables, packets, and IP addresses up through DNS, TCP, HTTP, and the browser rendering this page. 600+ concepts you can drill into, scene by scene.

title: Calculus, End to End
description: All of first-year calculus on one map — Functions, Limits, Differentiation, Integration, Differential Equations, Numerical Methods — each node carrying its actual formula. Drill in scene by scene instead of drowning in one flat diagram.

title: Chess openings
description: The opening tree, move by move — from 1.e4 and 1.d4 down through the Sicilian, the Ruy Lopez, the Queen's Gambit and their sharp sub-variations. Each line branches into the next move, the players who made it famous, and the games that defined it. Walk the theory scene by scene instead of squinting at a wall of notation.
